title: Capsicum milleri
taxonomy: Capsicum milleri is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, Solanaceae. It belongs to the genus Capsicum, which includes a wide range of pepper species. Within the genus Capsicum, Capsicum milleri is classified as one of the species that are native to tropical and subtropical regions. This species is closely related to other species such as Capsicum baccatum and Capsicum pubescens. Further classification may involve its placement within the Capsicum section, possibly the Capsicum section of the Solanaceae family.
